goals: Test whether the AdminIndexAPI returns index information with metadata for all configured entities, including expected metadata fields and statuses
activities: call createAdminUser function and store the container
call medusaIntegrationTestRunner function with testSuite as argument
call api.get on /admin/index/details endpoint with adminHeaders
assert that response data has property metadata
loop through entities and call response.data.metadata.find on each entity
assert that entity metadata is defined and has properties id, entity, status, fields, updated_at, and last_synced_key
loop through entities and call response.data.metadata.find on each entity
assert that productMetadata is defined and has properties id, entity, status, fields, updated_at, and last_synced_key
